{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas Besdeewi-
gajß nogreeschabß no fawas Res-
deewibas / un darra Teetu un
Taifnibu/ tad wiꞥsch zaur teem
dsihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr fakkat juhs: Ta
Kluga Zetsch ne irr pareisi; Es weens fawa Tuwaka Se
teexafchu juhs ikweenu pehz ta-
weent Zettein / ak Israëta
Nams!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas notikahß diwi-
padejinitâ Gaddâ nuhsas Nis-
wechanaß / definitâ Mehnefi /
peektâ Deena tahß Mehnes/ tad
nahze weens pee mannim/ kas no
Jerusalemes bij isglahbees / un
fazzija: Tas Pilsfahts irr is-
kauts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu btja ta KUNGA
Rohka Wafkarâ pahr manni bi-
juti/ pirnis ka tas Jsglahbtajs
nahze/ un bij mannu Mutti at-
darrijs/ kamehr tas Rihta pee
man nahze/ ta tappe manna
Mutte atwehrta/ un es ne btju
wairß mehins.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notikke ta KUNGA
Wahrs us man/ kas fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ tee
kas fchinnis tukschas Weetâß
dsihwo eeksh Israëta Semmes/
runna un fakka: Ahbraäns btja
weenâs weenigs ( Wihrs/) un
cemanteja to Semmi/ bet mehs
effaim dauds/ ta Semme irr
nuums dohta par Eemantoschann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht fakki us teen:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs walkajat to
binu weenumehr / juhs de
Negantibu / un apgahna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs tew us
reem fazzijht : Ta fakka
Klugs KUNGS: Tik teef
ka es dsihwoju/ tee kas tuk
Weetâß dsihwo / krittihß
Sohbinn/ un es nodohschu
kas wirs Lauka irr/ teem S
reem par Barribu/ ka tee w
ehd/ un tee kas Stiprumß
Allâß irr/ nomirs zaur Me
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es darritchu to C
mt par pohstu Weetn un Js
ztinafchanu/ un ta Lepniba
na Stipruma mittefees/ u
fraëta Kalnt buhs pohstâ/ k
weenain tur buhs pahreet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tee fajuttibs/
tas KUNGS esmu/ tad e
Semini par pohstu Weet
par Istruhztinafchanu darri
nu/ wiffu winxo Negan
deht/ ko tee irr darritjschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu af Zilweka Beh
tee Behrni tawu Laußbu r
prett teeni pee Seenahm
Nanuna Durwis / un n
runna ar ohtra/ ikweens a
wu Brahti/ un fakka : Na
"
    }
  ],
